title: HybridLib
description: A Library Mod for the MassTech Mods
body:
A Simple Library Mod For the MassTech Mods

Adds Items and a Creative Tab

MassTech The Mod And Masstech Angel Ring Require this mod to work It Holds items like 
Nether Ingot which requires 3 Iron and 1 Nether Star to craft 

This Mod isnt Meant to be By Itself Incase You wanted to know

Simple Reminder if u didnt download from Curseforge or Modrinth DONT DOWNLOAD
